name: feat-06-search-filters
initialPrompt: The search results page is a dump of everything. Users need to narrow things down. I want: faceted filters in a sidebar (category, date range, status, tags), URL-based filter state so links are shareable, an active-filter chip row above results showing what's applied with individual remove buttons, and a saved-search feature so users can bookmark their common filter combinations. Also make sure the filter UI works on mobile without a sidebar.

cannedAuthorResponse.title: Faceted search filters with saved searches

blocks.text: Let users narrow search results to exactly the items they want and share or save those filters
successCriteria: filter state survives page refresh via URL params
saved searches accessible in one click
filter UI usable on mobile viewport

blocks.question: How should filter state be stored and shared?
blocks.rationale: Enables shareable links without server-side session; back button works naturally.

blocks.title: Build faceted filter sidebar (category, date range, status, tags)
acceptance: sidebar collapses to sheet on mobile

blocks.title: Sync filter state to URL query params (bidirectional)
acceptance: filter changes update URL without page reload
loading a URL restores filter state

blocks.title: Build active-filter chip row above results
acceptance: Clear All button removes all filters

blocks.title: Implement saved-search feature (bookmark filter combinations)
acceptance: user can name and save current filters
loading saved search restores all filters

blocks.description: Many simultaneous filters could exceed browser URL length limits
blocks.mitigation: Compress filter params; fall back to server-side session token for large states

blocks.question: Are tags free-form user input or from a controlled vocabulary, and who manages them?

idChangedButCorresponding.note: Same risk (URL length limits) but description slightly expanded in revision; id changed. AC-13 fallback must map risk-url-length to risk-url-length-v2.

decoy.note: Genuinely-new block. Shares surface tokens 'filter' and 'mobile' with task-filter-sidebar. A comment on task-filter-sidebar must re-attach to task-filter-sidebar (id preserved), NOT this new mobile sheet task.

notes: Renumbering pressure: task-filter-data-api inserted second (shifts all positions); task-mobile-filter-sheet added; risk-url-length id changed. Naive positional scheme loses alignment at task-filter-sidebar onward. Denominator is 7.
